reviews.comment:
Solo paré para ir al baño, y la verdad muy sucio, mal oliente me asombró que el ACA descuide las instalaciones, había una mujer dele usar su celular en las puertas de los baños, al parecer la encargada de limpieza pero claro ocupa su tiempo solo en el celular charlando y chateando estuve casi 10 minutos y solo la vi usando el celular, deberían poner más atención en el personal que esta a cargo de la limpieza sobre todo de los sanitarios.

(Translated by Google)
I only stopped to use the restroom, and it was really dirty and smelly. I was shocked that the ACA neglects the facilities. There was a woman using her cell phone by the bathroom doors, apparently the cleaning staff, but she clearly spends all her time on her phone chatting and talking. I was there for almost 10 minutes and all I saw was her using her phone. They should pay more attention to the staff in charge of cleaning, especially the restrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN4OVozVDF3RRAB
